categories.label: Official company announcements
categories.description: Vendor announcements, release notes, product docs, and official launch pages.

categories.label: Model cards
categories.description: Public model cards and model metadata pages.

categories.label: Research papers
categories.description: Preprints, technical reports, and research papers.

categories.label: Public repositories
categories.description: Public repositories, releases, tags, and changelogs.

categories.label: Benchmark and evaluation releases
categories.description: Benchmark suites, scorecards, methodology notes, and evaluation releases.

categories.label: Regulatory and policy sources
categories.description: Government, standards, policy, legal, and regulatory sources.

categories.label: Credible technical news
categories.description: Credible public news used for discovery and context.

categories.label: GitHub releases and changelogs
categories.description: GitHub release feeds, changelogs, tags, and project update pages.

categories.label: Public security advisories
categories.description: Public vulnerability advisories, bulletins, and disclosure pages.

sources.title: OpenAI News
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite OpenAI and the canonical announcement URL.
sources.safety_notes: Discovery only; do not infer availability without source support.

sources.title: Anthropic News
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite Anthropic and the specific announcement URL.
sources.safety_notes: Discovery only; confirm beta scope and availability before publication.

sources.title: Google AI Blog
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite Google and the canonical blog URL.
sources.safety_notes: Discovery only; separate company, model, and product claims.

sources.title: Hugging Face Model Cards
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite model publisher and model-card URL.
sources.safety_notes: Do not infer launch timing from model-card visibility alone.

sources.title: arXiv AI Recent Submissions
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite title, authors when available, identifier, and paper URL.
sources.safety_notes: Preprints require editorial review and should not imply product availability.

sources.title: GitHub Public Repository Watchlist
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite owner, repository, release tag, or changelog URL.
sources.safety_notes: Check license and maintainer context before publication.

sources.title: HELM Benchmark
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite benchmark, publisher, methodology, and result page.
sources.safety_notes: Do not summarize outcomes without methodology review.

sources.title: EU AI Act Policy Page
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite institution, policy page, and update date when available.

sources.title: Reuters Technology AI Coverage
sources.attribution_requirements: Use as context and prefer primary sources for technical claims.
sources.safety_notes: Do not use secondary coverage as the sole technical source when a primary source exists.

sources.title: GitHub Blog Changelog
sources.safety_notes: Separate platform updates from repository releases.

sources.title: GitHub Security Advisories
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite advisory identifier, affected project, and advisory URL.
sources.safety_notes: Security topics require extra review; avoid exploit details beyond source summary.
